output: Final verification completed, but T4 is blocked rather than fully green. The duplicate-asset lightbox reproduction script passed and was deleted afterward, `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` passed within the full video-editor run. The full `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/` suite did not pass cleanly: 2 tests failed in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` (`routes the first child clip's outer-left handle through the pinned-group outer resize session` and `keeps the outer-left preview boundary fixed on release after a pointer drag`). Diff review of the lightbox work confirmed `initialVariantId` is still preserved, the close handler clears both `lightboxAssetKey` and `lightboxClipId`, and the shot-group color still comes from `getShotColor()` with Tailwind classes rather than hardcoded shot colors. The forbidden-path audit also found an unrelated pre-existing worktree change under `src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts`, so the repository does not currently satisfy the zero-shared-lightbox-diff requirement.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verification was executed end-to-end. The standalone reproduction script for the duplicate-asset lightbox case passed, `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` passed inside the full video-editor suite. The full `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/` run did not finish cleanly: 2 tests failed in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` (`routes the first child clip's outer-left handle through the pinned-group outer resize session` and `keeps the outer-left preview boundary fixed on release after a pointer drag`). Those failures are outside the files changed for this lightbox feature. Diff review confirmed the lightbox work preserves `initialVariantId`, clears both `lightboxAssetKey` and `lightboxClipId` on close, and uses `getShotColor()` plus Tailwind classes instead of hardcoded shot colors. Forbidden-path audit did not pass cleanly because `git diff --name-only -- src/domains/media-lightbox src/shared/components/lightbox` reported an unrelated pre-existing change at `src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Not fully.
